Off Calendar Dec-28-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Michael Fenili, 415-939-5602, Mani Om, 810-425-4360 & Mary Lund, 510-425-4360, plaintiffs and opposing parties appearing in propria persona.

RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS --
DEFENDANT GREG BECCIO, JESSICA JORDAN, TODD CHAMPAIGN, KATRINA MANTRINI'S Notice Of Motion To Change Venue to Santa Cruz in Monterey County is GRANTED; no opposition filed; And For Sanctions, GRANTED TO THE AMOUNT OF $1,250.00. PLAINTIFFS DID NOT NOTIFY OPPOSING COUNSEL OF THEIR INTENT TO APPEAR AND ARGUE. AS A REULT THE COURT COULD NOT ENTERTAIN ARGUMENT. Prevailing party to submit form of order. JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN, REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON CSR# 1558. (301/JLW)
